scripts.prepare-next-config: node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('next.config.mjs', 'const nextConfig = { images: { remotePatterns: [] }, webpack: (config) => { config.resolve.fallback = { fs: false }; return config; } }; export default nextConfig;\n')"
scripts.build: npm run prepare-next-config && next build && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('next.config.mjs', { force: true })"
